Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Lycus]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Lycus is a sibling of Andra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Lycus rescued Andra from a fish in the cave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Lycus is with Andra's mother outside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Lycus is a person whom Simon rescued.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Lycus is a person who brightened upon seeing Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Lycus holds a sword that is too large for him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Lycus helped carry Caius into Valinhall.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Lycus asked Simon how the rain garden was.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Lycus shook his head wearily at Andra's laughter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Lycus Agnos is Andra's brother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Lycus is out of breath and holding back tears while finding Erastes fighting Benson.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Lycus's father is Caius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Lycus was present in Simon's bedroom.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
